subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast believer in the verses of God! Thy numerous letters have been received, and thy complaint regarding the paucity of correspondence from others hath been noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن موقن بایات الله مکاتیب متعدده شما واصل و شکایت از قلت مراسلات غیر
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
